revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十九]][[zh:六月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十九]][[zh:六月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十九]][[zh:六月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十九]][[zh:六月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 19|qq=June 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Empress Kōgyoku|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – The oath under the great Zelkova tree occurred. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpyō-shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō-shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373169}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|756|en|756|qid=Q31121|lt=756|1=756}} ) – Personal items of Emperor Shōmu were offered to the Buddha of Tōdai-ji, leading to the establishment of {{ill|Shōsōin|en|Shōsōin|qid=Q2379007|lt=Shōsōin|1=Shōsōin}} . * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – {{ill|Honnō-ji Incident|en|Honnō-ji Incident|qid=Q169598|lt=Incident at Honnō-ji|1=Honnō-ji Incident}} occurred. * Year 5 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}} , {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) – Opening of the port of Shimoda due to the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|en|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|qid=Q1194699|lt=Treaty of Amity and Commerce|1=Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)}} .
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97379316}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|926|en|926|qid=Q24369|lt=926|1=926}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami|1=Emperor Murakami}} , 62nd emperor (d. {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}} )
== Deaths == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} , {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shizong of Later Zhou|ja|世宗 (後周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shizong of Later Zhou|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 柴栄|1=Chai Rong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1319646}} , Emperor Chai Rong (b. unknown) * Year 6 of {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1787|en|1787|qid=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|qid=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu|1=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} became senior councilor (Rōjū) and began the {{ill|Kansei Reforms|ja|Kanseiの改革|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei Reforms|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Year 6 of {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}} ) – {{ill|Imagawa Ujichika|en|Imagawa Ujichika|qid=Q909023|lt=Imagawa Ujichika|1=Imagawa Ujichika}} , daimyō (b. {{ill|1473|en|1473|qid=Q6594|lt=1473|1=1473}} ) * Year 6 of Kan'ei (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}} , {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}} ) – First generation {{ill|Kakiemon|en|Kakiemon|qid=Q1721885|lt=Sakaida Kakiemon|1=Kakiemon}} , Imari ware potter
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|18|6|20|5|19|7|6|0619|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
